positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a forest fox silhouette sitting alertly among stylized, flowing mountain peaks. The composition should be central and balanced, with the fox as the main focus. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, earthy ochre, and crisp white. Style should be vector art meets modern tattoo flash, favoring clean lines and strong, bold outlines. Background elements (trees, mountains) should simplify into graphic, repeating patterns or negative space. Studio lighting, designed for screen printing onto fabric, high resolution, perfect symmetry, suitable for apparel print.
negative: photorealism, blur, ugly, deformed, messy, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, noise, artifacts, grain, jpeg artifacts, grainy, distracting details
